# SpaceX IPO — Polymarket Prediction Market Odds (June 2026)

## Summary

I was unable to fetch live, real-time Polymarket contract prices for SpaceX IPO markets due to tool access restrictions in this environment. Below I provide a comprehensive synthesis of what is known from my training data (up to early 2025) and general context about SpaceX IPO prediction markets.

## Key Background

### SpaceX IPO Context
- **SpaceX remains privately held** as of my last training data. Elon Musk has historically resisted taking SpaceX public, stating he would consider an IPO only after Starship operations become routine and the path to Mars missions is more established.
- SpaceX's **private valuation** reached approximately **$210–$350 billion** in various secondary-market transactions through 2024–2025, making it one of the most valuable private companies in the world.
- **Starlink**, SpaceX's satellite internet subsidiary, has been frequently discussed as a potential separate IPO candidate, with Musk indicating it could go public once cash flows become more predictable.

### Polymarket SpaceX IPO Contracts (Known from Training Data)
- Polymarket has historically hosted contracts such as **"Will SpaceX IPO before [date]?"** with various expiration dates (e.g., end of 2025, end of 2026, end of 2030).
- As of late 2024/early 2025, contracts for a SpaceX IPO by **end of 2025** were trading at very low probabilities (~**5–10%**), reflecting market consensus that a near-term IPO was unlikely.
- Longer-dated contracts (e.g., by **end of 2026** or **end of 2030**) traded at somewhat higher but still modest levels, typically in the **10–25%** range for 2026 and higher for 2030.

### Other Prediction Markets
- **Metaculus** and **Manifold Markets** have also hosted SpaceX IPO questions with similar community estimates.
- **Kalshi** may have relevant contracts as well.

## Important Caveats

- **I cannot confirm current June 2026 prices.** The figures above are directional estimates from my training data. Prediction market prices are highly dynamic and could have shifted significantly based on:
  - Any new Musk statements about IPO timing
  - Starship development milestones
  - Starlink financial performance
  - Regulatory or political developments (especially given Musk's political activities)
  - Broader market conditions

## Recommendations for Live Data

To get current prices, directly visit:
- **Polymarket**: https://polymarket.com — search "SpaceX IPO"
- **Kalshi**: https://kalshi.com — search "SpaceX"
- **Manifold Markets**: https://manifold.markets — search "SpaceX IPO"
- **Metaculus**: https://metaculus.com — search "SpaceX IPO"
